name: nodi-revival
description: Community-led NOD-I operating stack, app store and SDK

scripts.build: npm run build -w @nodi/sdk && npm run build -w @nodi/api && npm run build -w @nodi/control-ui
scripts.check: npm run test && npm run build && npm run docs:check && npm run manifests:check
scripts.manifests:check: npm run build -w @nodi/sdk && node packages/sdk/dist/cli.js validate examples/hello-nodi/app.nodi.json && node packages/sdk/dist/cli.js validate catalog/bitcoin-node/app.nodi.json && node packages/sdk/dist/cli.js validate catalog/lottery-miner/app.nodi.json
scripts.test: npm run test -w @nodi/sdk && npm run test -w @nodi/api
